subTitle: Masumi Ageo tries to discreetly discuss with Ume Matsuzaka about a planned meeting that she feels skeptical about attending.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: Misae and Shin-chan travel to the station to meet with Hiroshi but they are unable to find him which leaves them frustrated. However, eventually when they see each other, they are happy.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Misae and Shin-chan take a trip to Osaka and board the bullet train to travel. However, they come across the principal of the kindergarten on the way.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Hiroshi and Misae take Shin-chan to visit the zoo but Shin-chan and Hiroshi are more keen on observing beautiful women instead of the zoo animals. Later, Shin-chan plays with a lemur.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Without apprising his mother Misae, Shin-chan sneaks off to the girls' school attended by the Saitama Crimson Scorpions. Consequently, Misae scolds him.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: During a snowy winter morning, the cold makes Nene-chan disinterested in going to school. Consequently, she pretends to be unwell to convince her mother to allow her a break from school.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Misae has to step outside, Fumie helps with looking after Shin-chan. Whilst spending time together, Fumie teaches him mathematics.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan and his family visit a hotel where Misae gets locked out of the room whilst wearing only a towel. Consequently, she tries to hide.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Shin-chan scribbles on a wall, he is caught in the act by a security guard. However, despite her attempts to keep him in her custody, he escapes.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan, Misae and Hiroshi are joined by Shin-chan's grandparents to celebrate the New Year. Consequently, they eat their lunch and spend time together.

subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Whilst preparing to take a bath, Misae instructs Shin-chan to check if the temperature of the water is suitable. However, Shin-chan finds it challenging to do so.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: On a rainy day when Hiroshi is at home, Shin-chan pesters him into playing hide and seek with him. However, when Hiroshi searches for Shin-chan, he cannot find him.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: When Hiroshi returns from work, he brings home his coworker's old fax machine. However, Shin-chan faxes his drawings to Hiroshi and a letter to a news station.

subTitle: Misae coerces Shin-chan to do the dishes as punishment for hiding his lunch box in Shiro's house. However, Shin-chan messes up the kitchen.

subTitle: Shin-chan shares an energy drink with Hiroshi after he decides to go to sleep early. Consequently, Hiroshi struggles with sleep.

subTitle: After watching Misae cut a pair of pants short, Shin-chan impulsively ends up cutting all the clothes short when Misae steps out for a call.
